Telecom equipment share are selling off hard Thursday following a grim Q2 warning from Calix, a provider of broadband communications access gear.
In effect, Calix is saying this is not a Calix-specific issue.
And if that is true, the pain is going to be felt by a variety of other companies that serve the same carriers that Calix does.
